mapper.sql: id, name, display_name, category, version, content, create_time, creator
mapper.insert: insert into wf_process_definition (id, name, display_name, category, version, content, create_time, creator) values (#{id}, #{name}, #{displayName}, #{category}, #{version}, #{bytes, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.BlobTypeHandler}, #{createTime}, #{creator})
mapper.select: select max(version) from wf_process_definition where name = #{name}
